title: Tuban Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Tuban with a Z-Score of +3.43. Temperatures are extremely high, causing severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tuban is characterized by a high Z-Score of +3.43, indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The Score of 10.0/10 and Level CRITICAL confirm the severity of the situation, with a high CDD of 11.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity of 72% and wind speed of 9.7 km/h are contributing to the discomfort and severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact immediately.
